---
title: "Talks & Presentations"
---

## Conference & Seminar Talks

**Modeling Content Spreading on Networks Through Network Science and Graph Neural Networks**  
*Joint Mathematics Meetings, Seattle, January 2025*  
<a href="assets/talks/slided_test.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Slides</a>

**Higher Order Cheeger Inequalities**  
*Node seminar, Kansas State University, November 2024*   
<a href="assets/talks/Cheeger.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Slides</a>

**Applications of Neural Networks to Modulus on Networks**  
*SIAM Central States Section Annual Meeting 2024, Kansas City, October 2024*  
<a href="assets/talks/Applications of Neural Networks to Modulus on Networks.pptx" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Slides</a>

**Introduction to GFlowNets**  
*Node seminar, Kansas State University, March 2024*  
<a href="assets/talks/Gflownets Slides.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Slides</a>

**Introduction to Threshold Networks**  
*Node seminar, Kansas State University, November 2023*  
<a href="assets/talks/ctln_slides.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Slides</a>



<!-- ---
layout: page
permalink: assets/talks&talks/
title: Talks
description:
nav: true
nav_order: 6
---

### Network Science and Machine Learning

*Modeling Content Spreading on Networks Through Network Science and Graph Neural Networks* <a href="assets/talks/slided_test.pdf" target="_blank">Slides</a>\\
*Introduction to Gflownets* <a href="assets/talks/Gflownets Slides.pdf" target="_blank">Slides</a>\\
*Introduction to Threshold Networks* <a href="assets/talks/ctln_slides.pdf" target="_blank">Slides</a>\\
*Applications of Neural Networks to Modulus on Networks* <a href="assets/talks/Applications of Neural Networks to Modulus on Networks.pptx" target="_blank">Slides</a>\\
*Higher Order Cheeger Inequalities* <a href="assets/talks/Cheeger.pdf" target="_blank">Slides</a>

### Representation Theory, Symplectic Geometry

*Introduction to Lie Algebras* <a href="assets/talks/lie_alg.pdf" target="_blank">Slides</a>\\
*Symplectic Reduction* <a href="assets/talks/Symplectic Reduction.pdf" target="_blank">Slides</a>\\
*Orbit Method* <a href="assets/talks/orbit method.pdf" target="_blank">Exposition</a>
 -->
